hero_sub: Ironpine Web Studio builds custom websites for small businesses, wellness professionals, estheticians, and service providers across Michigan — beautiful design, local SEO, booking integration, and a partner who stays.
services_intro: From esthetician studios to local retail shops to professional service firms — if your business depends on trust and first impressions, we build for you. No templates. No hand-offs. No disappearing.
svc1_desc: Custom websites for local businesses, service providers, and wellness professionals. Designed from your brand outward — no templates, no shortcuts.
svc2_desc: Lightning-fast, modern frontends built in Svelte or React with TypeScript throughout. Lighthouse scores that impress both Google and customers.
svc3_desc: Connect your site to Acuity, Jane App, Vagaro, or any scheduling tool. Turn visitors into booked clients automatically.
svc4_desc: Structured data, Google Business optimization, and local keyword targeting — so customers searching nearby find you first.
svc5_desc: Scroll-driven animations and micro-interactions that make your site feel alive — subtle, refined, and unforgettable.
svc6_desc: Monthly retainers for updates, new features, and support. A web partner who knows your business — not a ticket queue.
band_quote: The best websites don't shout — they
band_quote_end: exactly what someone needed to hear.
process_sub: Whether you're a solo esthetician, a therapy practice, or a growing small business — every project starts with a real conversation.
step1_body: Before a single line of code — I listen. Your story, your clients, the feeling you want to create. This 1–2 hour conversation becomes the compass for every decision that follows.
step2_body: High-fidelity Figma mockups — no generic templates. We refine together until every screen feels exactly right before building anything.
step3_body: Svelte + TypeScript development with weekly previews. Fast, accessible, and built to rank on Google from day one.
step4_body: Launch day is the beginning, not the end. I handle deployment, monitor performance, and stay available as your business grows.
t1_quote: Austin built something I didn't know I needed — a website that genuinely feels like walking into my studio. My clients comment on how calming it is before they even arrive.
t2_quote: I had a website before. I had a developer before. Neither felt like a partner. Austin has been the most valuable addition to my practice outside of clinical training.
t3_quote: My bookings doubled in the first three months after launch. I didn't realize how much my old site was quietly turning people away. The difference is remarkable.
about1_h: Built for businesses that care about the experience they create
about1_body: Ironpine Web Studio was founded on a simple belief: small businesses deserve the same quality web presence as large companies — without the agency price tag or the runaround.
about2_h: Your website should feel like your business
about2_body: Whether you run a skin care studio, a counseling practice, a boutique shop, or any service business — your website should reflect who you actually are, not a template someone else already used.
about3_h: A developer who stays after launch day
about3_body: The most common complaint about web developers: they disappear after launch. I don't. Monthly retainer clients have a direct line to me for updates, questions, new pages, or anything that comes up.
footer_copy: © 2026 Ironpine Web Studio LLC · All rights reserved.
meta_title: Ironpine Web Studio — Web Design for Small Businesses & Wellness Professionals | Michigan
meta_desc: Michigan web design studio specializing in wellness businesses, estheticians, therapists, and small businesses. Custom websites with booking integration, local SEO, and long-term support.
work_intro: Every site built from scratch — no templates, no page builders. Each one designed around the specific business, its clients, and the feeling it needs to create.
contact_intro: Tell me about your business and what you're looking for. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact_success_b: I'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contact_error: Something went wrong. Please email me directly.
contact_cal_sub: Pick a time that works for you and let's talk through your project.
